utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items. Each section is fully specified with detailed entries: property includes type, location, price, currency, features, and condo fees; financing includes loan details, terms, interest rate, and associated costs; legal_services includes service name, cost, currency, and included services; moving_services includes service level, cost, currency, and details; setup_services includes utility package, cost, currency, included services, and timeline; total_budget includes all cost components and totals with currency. Therefore, all six required items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a property labeled as 'Condo (1-bedroom, modern, open-concept)' in Downtown Toronto for CAD $475,000. Looking at the ground truth, the closest match under purchase_properties is 'New Build' (price CAD $480K, rating 10), since it aligns with the modern, smart home, eco-conscious, within-budget description. The financing type chosen is 'Joint Mortgage'. The ground truth for purchase financing includes 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 8) and 'First-Time Buyer' (rating 10). Since the assistant did not choose a specific first-time buyer program but a joint mortgage (standard shared arrangement), it is most similar to 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 8). For legal services, the assistant selected 'Basic Legal Package', which in the ground truth has a rating of 9. For moving services, the 'standard' package corresponds to 'Standard Moving' with a rating of 9. For setup services, the 'basic' utility package matches 'Basic Utilities' with a rating of 6.
